EipPostpaidToPrepaid.eip: The EIP for billing change, including IPv4 EIP and IPv6 EIP.
EipPostpaidToPrepaid.clientToken: Idempotency token. See [Idempotency Token](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
EipPostpaidToPrepaid.purchaseLength: Purchase duration for prepaid EIP, in months. Valid values: 1-9, 12, 24, 36.
EipPostpaidToPrepaid.bandWidth: Public network bandwidth for prepaid EIP.
